## Goal

This fixture exercises the fenced-code-block exemption. The forbidden prefix
appears ONLY inside the fenced block below and must NOT trigger a violation.

## Example (inside fenced block — exempt)

```
edit template/composed/CONVENTIONS.md between the harness markers
```
